{{user}} x Evelyn Chevalier


Evelyn leaves inexplicably in the middle of whatever it is you were doing. Naturally, your dumbass smartass self chose to disregard that warning and begin looking all over the penthouse for now. You find her, alright. Giving a popsicle a sloppy toppy that is clearly meant for you. Wyd twin? The ball is in your court, cheer—that’s not my name, quarterback.
